title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how technology is affecting each person's life and what benefits or drawbacks each situation might have.

images.label: A
images.description: A teenager scrolling through a smartphone while sitting alone in a café.

images.label: B
images.description: An elderly person receiving help from a family member to use a tablet computer.

images.label: C
images.description: An office worker using a virtual reality headset in a modern workplace.

followUp.question: Which group of people do you think benefits the most from modern technology? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how the learning experience differs and what advantages and disadvantages each method might have.

images.label: D
images.description: Students sitting in rows in a traditional classroom listening to a teacher at a chalkboard.

images.label: E
images.description: Children in a modern classroom using individual laptops to complete a task.

images.label: F
images.description: A student attending a live university lecture online from a home bedroom.

followUp.question: Which approach to education do you think is the most effective for students? (Why?)
